data.name: Wet Nightmares
data.detailed_description:
As another woman joins the list of the missing, deep within a forest, a man living in solitude is visited by a pretty stranger. Wet Nightmares is an Erotic Horror Visual Novel exploring the psyche of a haunted man and his depraved past.



- Explore the mind and nightmares of a hunted aspiring author.
- Uncover several different pathways through Wet Nightmares.
- Unlock several lovingly handcrafted sexual cinematics.



Wet Nightmares is currently in Early Access and production for the game is ongoing. Please take a look at our latest news posts for more insight and information.

As another woman joins the list of the missing, deep within a forest, a man living in solitude is visited by a pretty stranger. Wet Nightmares is an Erotic Horror Visual Novel exploring the psyche of a haunted man and his depraved past.



- Explore the mind and nightmares of a hunted aspiring author.

data.short_description: As another woman joins the list of the missing, deep within a forest, a man living in solitude is visited by a pretty stranger. Wet Nightmares is an Erotic Horror Visual Novel exploring the psyche of a haunted man and his depraved past.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bits
  • 處理器: Intel i3-6100T 3.2Ghz or similar
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 970 or similar
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
